methods.name: Smart Card Authentication
methods.description: Authentication using a physical card with an embedded integrated circuit that stores cryptographic keys and can perform cryptographic operations.
sources: @techreport{nistir7206,  title        = {Smart Cards and Mobile Device Authentication: An Overview and Implementation},  author       = {Jansen, Wayne and Gavrila, Serban and S{\'e}veillac, Cl{\'e}ment and Korolev, Vlad},  institution  = {National Institute of Standards and Technology},  number       = {NISTIR 7206},  year         = {2005},  doi          = {10.6028/NIST.IR.7206},  address      = {Gaithersburg, MD, USA}}
